summary: Partner Delivery | Mapping | Verify Page Loads Successfully
description: Partner Delivery Page should load with all sections visible and correctly positioned
gherkin:
When the user navigates to the "Partner Delivery" page using the Home screen or the left sidebar menu
Then the "Partner Delivery" page should be displayed.
And the user lands on the Mapping Page by default
And the "Data Centers" panel should be visible on the top-left
And the "Channels" panel should be visible to the right of the "Data Centers" panel
And the "Partners" panel should be visible on the bottom-left
And the "Targets" panel should be visible to the right of the "Partners" panel
And search input fields should be present above both "Channels" and "Targets" sections
And the "Clear" and "Confirm" buttons should be visible below the "Targets" panel

steps.action: *When* the user navigates to the "Partner Delivery" page using the Home screen or the left sidebar menu
steps.result:
*Then* the "Partner Delivery" page should be displayed.

*And* the user lands on the Mapping Page by default

*And* the "Data Centers" panel should be visible on the top-left

*And* the "Channels" panel should be visible to the right of the "Data Centers" panel

*And* the "Partners" panel should be visible on the bottom-left

*And* the "Targets" panel should be visible to the right of the "Partners" panel

*And* search input fields should be present above both "Channels" and "Targets" sections

*And* the "Clear" and "Confirm" buttons should be visible below the "Targets" panel
